narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 6-C (precinct in Ross County) has 699 registered voters, with 64.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
